message:
feat(quarantine): add Suspend and Sandbox containment action tiers

Add two new ContainmentAction tiers between Terminate and Allow with
threshold values that scale with degraded-coordinator mode:
- Normal mode: Suspend at 300k, Sandbox at 100k
- Degraded-coordinator mode: Suspend at 150k, Sandbox at 50k

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
